name: flick
description: A lightweight, extensible desktop launcher and plugin platform.
author: nutea <nutgeek@gmail.com>

scripts.typecheck:apps: pnpm --filter detach --filter feature --filter guide --filter superx --filter tpl --if-present run typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm check:runtime-deps && pnpm lint:all && pnpm typecheck && pnpm typecheck:apps && pnpm test
scripts.dev:all: pnpm dev:prepare && concurrently -n apps,electron "pnpm run dev:apps" "electron-vite dev"
scripts.lint:apps: pnpm --filter detach --filter feature --filter guide --filter superx --filter tpl run lint
scripts.dev:apps: concurrently -n feature,detach,tpl,guide,sx-web,sx-node "pnpm --filter feature run dev" "pnpm --filter detach run dev" "pnpm --filter tpl run dev" "pnpm --filter guide run dev" "pnpm --filter ./apps/superx run dev:web" "pnpm --filter ./apps/superx run dev:node"
scripts.apps:build:only: pnpm --filter detach --filter feature --filter guide --filter superx --filter tpl --parallel run build
scripts.electron:build: pnpm packages:build && pnpm native:build:release && pnpm native:verify:win && pnpm apps:build:only && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis --x64 && pnpm native:verify:win:package
scripts.electron:build:local: pnpm packages:build && pnpm native:build:release && pnpm native:verify:win && pnpm apps:build:only && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish never --win nsis --x64 && pnpm native:verify:win:package
scripts.electron:build:mac: pnpm packages:build && pnpm native:build:release && pnpm native:verify:mac && pnpm apps:build:only && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish never --mac dmg --arm64 && pnpm native:verify:mac:package
scripts.electron:build:linux: pnpm packages:build && pnpm native:build:release && pnpm native:verify:linux && pnpm apps:build:only && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish never --linux AppImage --x64 && pnpm native:verify:linux:package
